stimulus: A music journalist is examining annual attendance at three major concert halls. According to the table, the year in which all three halls had their highest attendance was ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the table to complete the statement?
rationale:
Choice C is correct because in 2019 every hall reached its highest attendance: Roy Thomson (410), Carnegie (700), and Symphony Hall (340).

Choice A is incorrect: 2017 totals (340, 620, 290) were lower at every hall. Choice B is incorrect: 2018 (360, 650, 305) was also lower at every hall. Choice D is incorrect: 2020 had the lowest attendance at every hall (120, 180, 95).
